issue.errorLine1: <string name="invalid_content_for_format">Content does not match the selected barcode format</string>
<string name="no_qr_codes_found">No QR codes found in this image</string>
<string name="no_qr_codes_found_detail">No QR codes found (tried WeChatQR, ZXing, ML Kit)</string>
<string name="clear_history_confirm">Are you sure you want to clear all history?</string>
<string name="wifi_wep_not_supported">WEP encryption is not supported on Android 10+. Please connect manually.</string>
<string name="wifi_suggestion_added">WiFi suggestion added for %1$s. Check system WiFi settings to connect.</string>
<string name="reset_database_confirm">This will delete all history data and reset encryption keys. This action cannot be undone. Continue?</string>
<string name="database_reset_success">Database reset successfully. App will restart.</string>
<string name="corner_radius_hint">Rounds the outer corners of the barcode image</string>
<string name="warning_barcode_not_scannable">Generated barcode cannot be recognized by this app. Please check content or format.</string>
<string name="warning_barcode_content_mismatch">Scan result does not match the original content. Original: %1$s, Scanned: %2$s. Please confirm if it is acceptable.</string>
<string name="warning_generate_only_format">This format can only be generated and cannot be recognized by this app.</string>
<string name="privacy_mode_description">Scanned QR codes will not be saved to history</string>
